parse
expectOut 'cacheKeyspace Counters'
expectOut 'cacheKeyspaceUser Counters svc1'
expectOut 'cacheKeyspaceUser Counters svc2'

-- shared/cache.go --
package shared

import (
    "encore.dev/storage/cache"
)

var Cluster = cache.NewCluster("shared-cache", cache.ClusterConfig{})

var Counters = cache.NewIntKeyspace[string](Cluster, cache.KeyspaceConfig{
    KeyPattern: "counters/:key",
})

-- svc1/svc1.go --
package svc1

import (
    "context"

    "test/shared"
)

//encore:api public
func Inc(ctx context.Context) error {
    _, err := shared.Counters.Increment(ctx, "k", 1)
    return err
}

-- svc2/svc2.go --
package svc2

import (
    "context"

    "test/shared"
    "test/util"
)

//encore:api public
func Read(ctx context.Context) error {
    return util.Bump(ctx, shared.Counters)
}

-- util/util.go --
package util

import (
    "context"

    "encore.dev/storage/cache"
)

// Bump exercises the "pass keyspace as a function argument" path.
func Bump(ctx context.Context, ks *cache.IntKeyspace[string]) error {
    _, err := ks.Increment(ctx, "k", 1)
    return err
}
